name: system-orchestration
description: Progressive disclosure skill for optimizing agent context windows and coordinating tasks across the Enterprise AI Fleet.
author: Enterprise AI Architecture

L1_Metadata.summary: Orchestrates complex cross-system AI workflows asynchronously. Discloses further details only upon specific invocation.

directives: 1. Start by analyzing the overarching objective without loading deep context.
2. Break down the objective into discrete, asynchronously manageable sub-tasks.
3. Delegate sub-tasks to specialized Copilot Fleet agents using standardized MCP resources.
4. Await asynchronous task completion and aggregate responses.
5. Request L3 Resources only if an agent encounters an error or requires deep contextual knowledge to proceed.
